title: Healthcare Ai Reliability in Uk (6 Months): Policy Analysis using Regulations
researchQuestion: What are the highest-confidence reliability gaps for enterprise teams in healthcare ai across UK over the next 6 months, based on regulations and analyzed through policy analysis?
prompt:
Produce a comprehensive survey for this structured idea cell:
Domain: healthcare_ai
Problem: reliability
Method: policy_analysis
Evidence: regulations
Population: enterprise_teams
Geography: uk
Time horizon: 6_months
Objective: gap_mapping
Include evidence quality, conflicting claims, and a prioritized gap map with next-step questions.

evidencePlan: Collect primary regulatory text, guidance notes, and enforcement updates.
Triangulate conflicting claims and annotate confidence per claim.
Prioritize sources with direct empirical or primary-text support.

inScope: healthcare ai initiatives affecting enterprise teams
outOfScope: Regions outside selected geography unless directly comparable
Long-horizon predictions beyond selected time horizon

title: Healthcare Ai Evaluation in Eu (12 Months): Incident Analysis using Production Incidents
